title: Functional analysis of factors interacting with newly-synthesized polypeptides
further_info: Recommended Reading Kramer G., Boehringer D., Ban N., Bukau B. (2009), The ribosome as a platform for co-translational processing, folding and targeting of newly synthesized proteins.
